title: Our Love Story
content:
We met at the airport, of all places. Somewhere in between arrivals and departures, in a moment that felt ordinary at the time, something unexpected started.

What followed was six months of getting to know each other, slowly and intentionally. No pressure, no rushing things. Just real conversations, shared time, and the quiet feeling that this might be something different.

Six months turned into four years of being together. We grew up side by side, figuring life out, supporting each other through everything, and choosing each other every single day. It wasn't perfect, but it was real, and it was ours.

At the end of 2023, we got married civilly. It was simple, but it meant everything to us. It was our way of saying we're in this for the long run.

Last year, we were blessed by God with our daughter, Cadence. She became a beautiful reminder of everything we've built together; Love, faith, and family.

And now, we're here. Standing before God, taking this next step in our journey. From that random moment at the airport to this day, it's been a story we've built together, and we're just getting started.
